programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Pregnant Cheryl wants to have a game night and play a game that she never loses, but Dana knows she cheats.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: The devil (James Lipton) comes to collect on a deal Jim made with him back when Jim was courting Cheryl.

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Scientist Bruce Banner (Edward Norton) desperately seeks a cure for the gamma radiation that contaminated his cells and turned him into The Hulk. Cut off from his true love Betty Ross (Liv Tyler) and forced to hide from his nemesis, Gen. Thunderbolt Ross (William Hurt), Banner soon comes face-to-face with a new threat: a supremely powerful enemy known as The Abomination (Tim Roth).

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Fallout
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team join forces with CIA assassin August Walker to prevent a disaster of epic proportions. Arms dealer John Lark and a group of terrorists known as the Apostles plan to use three plutonium cores for a simultaneous nuclear attack on the Vatican, Jerusalem and Mecca, Saudi Arabia. When the weapons go missing, Ethan and his crew find themselves in a desperate race against time to prevent them from falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Avengers: Infinity War
programme.desc: Iron Man, Thor, the Hulk and the rest of the Avengers unite to battle their most powerful enemy yet -- the evil Thanos. On a mission to collect all six Infinity Stones, Thanos plans to use the artifacts to inflict his twisted will on reality. The fate of the planet and existence itself has never been more uncertain as everything the Avengers have fought for has led up to this moment.

programme.title: Avengers: Endgame
programme.desc: Adrift in space with no food or water, Tony Stark sends a message to Pepper Potts as his oxygen supply starts to dwindle. Meanwhile, the remaining Avengers -- Thor, Black Widow, Captain America and Bruce Banner -- must figure out a way to bring back their vanquished allies for an epic showdown with Thanos, the evil demigod who decimated the planet and the universe.

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: A storm hits. Written by Christopher Storer; directed by Christopher Storer.

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: The staff prepares for the day. Written by Rene Gube & Karen Joseph Adcock; directed by Christopher Storer.

programme.title: The Wolverine
programme.desc: Lured to a Japan he hasn't seen since World War II, century-old mutant Wolverine (Hugh Jackman) finds himself in a shadowy realm of yakuza and samurai. Wolverine is pushed to his physical and emotional brink when he is forced to go on the run with a powerful industrialist's daughter (Tao Okamoto) and is confronted -- for the first time -- with the prospect of death. As he struggles to rediscover the hero within himself, he must grapple with powerful foes and the ghosts of his own haunted past.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A fairy tale adventure about a beautiful young woman and her one true love. He must find her after a long separation and save her. They must battle the evils of the mythical kingdom of Florin to be reunited with each other. Based on the William Goldman novel "The Princess Bride" which earned its own loyal audience.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: The Kid Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Old-school magic meets the modern world when young Alex stumbles upon the mythical sword Excalibur. He soon unites his friends and enemies, and they become knights who join forces with the legendary wizard Merlin. Together, they must save mankind from the wicked enchantress Morgana and her army of supernatural warriors.

programme.title: Susannah of the Mounties
programme.desc: A Mountie (Randolph Scott) and his sweetheart (Margaret Lockwood) adopt a little girl (Shirley Temple) orphaned by an Indian attack.

programme.title: Rebecca of Sunnybrook Farm
programme.desc: After Rebecca (Shirley Temple) is mistakenly rejected at an audition for a radio advertising campaign, her stepfather takes her upstate to stay at Sunnybrook Farm with her Aunt Miranda (Helen Westley), who bans her from show business. Meanwhile, advertising exec Tony Kent (Randolph Scott) desperately searches for Rebecca, who he has only heard, unaware that she's on the farm next to his. Tony's search is interrupted by many things -- including Rebecca's attractive cousin, Gwen (Gloria Stuart).

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: During a war between humans and the reptilian Drac race, spaceship pilot Willis Davidge ends up stranded on an alien world, along with enemy fighter Jeriba Shigan. While both Willis and his Drac counterpart can breathe on the planet, the environment and its creatures are relatively hostile, forcing the two to work together to survive. As time goes by, Willis and Jeriba become unlikely friends, though their unique relationship faces considerable challenges.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: When a UFO lands in Washington, D.C., bearing a message for Earth's leaders, all of humanity stands still. Klaatu has come on behalf of alien life who have been watching Cold War-era nuclear proliferation on Earth. But it is Klaatu's soft-spoken robot Gort that presents a more immediate threat to onlookers. A single mother and her son teach the world about peace and tolerance in this moral fable, ousting the tanks and soldiers that greet the alien's arrival.

programme.title: The Day Mars Invaded Earth
programme.desc: A Cape Canaveral scientist finds Martians reducing people to ashes and taking their places.

programme.title: The Alligator People
programme.desc: Newly married nurse Joyce Webster (Beverly Garland) doesn't know what to think when her husband, Paul (Richard Crane), disappears during a train ride. She hires private investigators and eventually tracks him to an old bayou plantation, where the owner (Frieda Inescort) insists she's never heard of Paul. Joyce sticks around anyway and soon learns that local doctor Mark Sinclair (George Macready) has been using a life-altering alligator serum on the town's residents, and that Paul is among them.

programme.title: The Fly
programme.desc: When scientist Andre Delambre (Al Hedison) tests his matter transporter on himself, an errant housefly makes its way into the transportation chamber, and things go horribly wrong. As a result, Delambre's head and arm are now that of the insect. Slowly losing himself to the fly, Delambre turns to his wife, Helene (Patricia Owens), for help. But when tragedy strikes, Delambre's brother (Vincent Price) and Inspector Charas (Herbert Marshall) are forced to pick up the investigation.

programme.title: The Curse of the Fly
programme.desc: Scantily clad Patricia Stanley (Carole Gray) breaks out of a mental hospital and is picked up by passing motorist Martin Delambre (George Baker). The two do not reveal much about themselves to each other, but nevertheless decide to get married. At the Delambre family mansion, Patricia meets Martin's father, Henri (Brian Donlevy), an eccentric scientist. Snooping about the grounds, she discovers evidence of the family's strange experiments in teleportation and the grisly results thereof.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother and having no other known relatives, Evie takes a DNA test and discovers a long-lost cousin she never knew she had. Invited by her newfound family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, Evie's at first seduced by the sexy aristocratic host. However, she's soon thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets about her family history and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.

programme.title: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: A mysterious masked maniac terrorizes residents of Plymouth, Mass., one year after a Black Friday riot ended in tragedy. Picking off victims one by one, the seemingly random revenge killings soon become part of a larger, sinister plan.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: Shocking surprises await a couple when they travel to a coastal island to sample a chef's lavish menu at an exclusive restaurant.

programme.title: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: A mysterious masked maniac terrorizes residents of Plymouth, Mass., one year after a Black Friday riot ended in tragedy. Picking off victims one by one, the seemingly random revenge killings soon become part of a larger, sinister plan.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: Shocking surprises await a couple when they travel to a coastal island to sample a chef's lavish menu at an exclusive restaurant.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother and having no other known relatives, Evie takes a DNA test and discovers a long-lost cousin she never knew she had. Invited by her newfound family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, Evie's at first seduced by the sexy aristocratic host. However, she's soon thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets about her family history and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: When a devious plot separates CIA agent Peter Sandza (Kirk Douglas) from his son, Robin (Andrew Stevens), the distraught father manages to see through the ruse. Taken because of his psychic abilities, Robin is being held by Ben Childress (John Cassavetes), who is studying people with supernatural powers in hopes of developing their talents as weapons. Soon Peter pairs up with Gillian (Amy Irving), a teen who has telekinesis, to find and rescue Robin.

programme.title: Down Argentine Way
programme.desc: In the United States, Glenda Crawford (Betty Grable) buys a horse from Argentinian Ricardo Quintana (Don Ameche), but the sale is canceled when the latter's father, Casiano (J. Carrol Naish), objects because of a long-standing grudge against the Crawfords. Nevertheless, when Glenda visits Argentina on vacation, the pair disregard their family feud and fall madly in love amidst the lush scenery and buoyant local entertainment, which includes performances from Carmen Miranda (Carmen Miranda).

programme.title: Will Success Spoil Rock Hunter?
programme.desc: Rock Hunter (Tony Randall) writes television commercials, and he's hatched a strategy for a new beauty product. Needing a famous face to deliver his message, Rock tries to recruit actress Rita Marlowe (Jayne Mansfield). At first, she thinks it's beneath her, but she wants to make her actor lover (Mickey Hargitay) envious, so she agrees, as long as Rock pretends to be her boyfriend. Soon, Rock is running the ad company, but his ascension is greeted by all kinds of personal troubles.

programme.title: Surf Party
programme.desc: An Arizona gal (Patricia Morrow) and her friends enjoy sun, sand and romance when they drive out to California for a surfing vacation.

programme.title: The Horror of It All
programme.desc: Yankee salesman Jack (Pat Boone) wants to marry Cynthia Marley (Erica Rogers), and they travel to her family's English estate to break the good news. Cynthia warns that the family is a bit odd, which proves to be an understatement. One relative is an ex-thespian who still believes he's in a play, another behaves like a vampire and a third is imprisoned in the cellar due to his violent tendencies. But things get really sinister when the Marleys start succumbing to violent fates, one by one.

programme.title: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Just after becoming the director of the Psychoneurotic Institute for the Very, Very Nervous, Dr. Richard H. Thorndyke is greeted by a series of mysterious events. When his colleagues -- including the militaristic and mustachioed Nurse Diesel -- become leery of his questions, they accuse him of murder. Thorndyke's own mental health comes into question as he struggles to clear his name in the midst of a crippling bout of a condition known as high anxiety.

programme.title: Young Frankenstein
programme.desc: Respected medical lecturer Dr. Frederick Frankenstein (Gene Wilder) learns that he has inherited his infamous grandfather's estate in Transylvania. Arriving at the castle, Dr. Frankenstein soon begins to recreate his grandfather's experiments with the help of servants Igor (Marty Feldman), Inga (Teri Garr) and the fearsome Frau Blücher (Cloris Leachman). After he creates his own monster (Peter Boyle), new complications ensue with the arrival of the doctor's fiancée, Elizabeth (Madeline Kahn).

programme.title: 9 to 5
programme.desc: Office satire about three female secretaries who decide to get revenge on their tyrannical, sexist boss by abducting him and running the business themselves. The trio, one of whom has been passed over for promotion because she is a woman, spend a night together having drug-induced fantasies of killing the slave-driving chauvinist. One of them panics the following day when she suspects she really has poisoned the tyrant.

programme.title: Just Married
programme.desc: Tom (Ashton Kutcher) and Sarah (Brittany Murphy) are two lovebirds from different worlds. He's an average guy with a fondness for beer who works a low-level job, while she's an aspiring writer from a wealthy and cultured family. The disapproval of family and friends doesn't prevent the pair from marrying, but their disastrous honeymoon in Italy, with an unwelcome appearance by Sarah's ex-boyfriend, Peter (Christian Kane), nearly succeeds in tearing them apart.

programme.title: Bride Wars
programme.desc: Since the time they were little girls, best friends Liv (Kate Hudson) and Emma (Anne Hathaway) have been planning every aspect of their future weddings, including choosing the same destination: New York's famed Plaza Hotel. But when a clerical error causes a clash in wedding dates, Liv and Kate discover their inner demons -- with their lifelong friendship as a possible casualty.

programme.title: 27 Dresses
programme.desc: Perennial bridesmaid Jane always puts the needs of others before her own, making her the go-to gal whenever someone needs help with wedding plans. So when Jane's younger sister Tess snags the man Jane secretly loves, Jane finds herself questioning her role as a wedding junkie for the first time in her life. Meanwhile, a handsome reporter sees Jane's unusual story as his ticket off the bridal beat.

programme.title: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: Ally Darling (Anna Faris) is realizing she's a little lost in life. Her latest romance has just fizzled out, and she's just been fired from her marketing job. Then she reads an eye-opening magazine article that warns that 96 percent of women who've been with 20 or more lovers are unlikely to find a husband. Determined to turn her life around and prove the article wrong, Ally embarks on a mission to find the perfect mate from among her numerous ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product, a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: The Animal
programme.desc: A bumbling police file clerk takes a walk on the wild side when a mad doctor repairs his body with animal parts.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: At Home In Mitford
programme.desc: An attractive writer with writer’s block who hasn’t quite gotten over her recent divorce soon discovers the idyllic village she used to visit in her youth might just be the place to help recover.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: Based on the beloved bestselling novel, A Dog's Way Home chronicles the heartwarming adventure of Bella (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), a devoted dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Matilda (1996)
programme.desc: Danny De Vito, Rhea Perlman and Mara Wilson star in this modern fairytale that mixes hilarious humor with a magical message of love.

programme.title: At Home In Mitford
programme.desc: An attractive writer with writer’s block who hasn’t quite gotten over her recent divorce soon discovers the idyllic village she used to visit in her youth might just be the place to help recover.

programme.desc: Based on the beloved bestselling novel, A Dog's Way Home chronicles the heartwarming adventure of Bella (voiced by Bryce Dallas Howard), a devoted dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.

programme.title: Matilda (1996)
programme.desc: Danny De Vito, Rhea Perlman and Mara Wilson star in this modern fairytale that mixes hilarious humor with a magical message of love.

programme.title: How Do You Know?
programme.desc: Feeling a bit past her prime at 27, former athlete Lisa Jorgenson finds herself in the middle of a love triangle, as a corporate guy in crisis competes with Lisa's current, baseball-playing beau.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.

programme.title: Are We There Yet? (2005)
programme.desc: Ice Cube plays Nick, a playboy bachelor and sports memorabilia collector who dates a divorced mother of two young kids who never like the men their mom dates. Things go awry when Nick offers to drive the kids from Portland to Vancouver where their mother is stuck for work.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: A family leaves the big city for a fixer-upper in the 'burbs, but their investment quickly turns from a dream into a nightmare.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.sub-title: Oily To Bed, Oily To Rise
programme.desc: The Stooges are tramps looking for handouts. Although the boys are down and out, Curly seems to get everything he wishes for. After some trouble with a farmer, the boys come across an abandoned car, one of Curly's wishes. The car actually belongs to some con men who have just gypped the widow Jenkins out of her land. The boys wind up at the Mrs. Jenkins house just in time for a free meal. To repay Mrs. Jenkins the boys try to fix her well and instead unleash an oil geyser. Learning that Mrs. Jenkins has been swindled, the boys go to retrieve the deed before it can be recorded. They find the bad guys and after a wild fight recover the deed. The boys return the deed to Mrs. Jenkins and marry her daughters; April, May and June.

programme.title: Friends With Money
programme.desc: Three well-heeled married women and their single, financially challenged friend negotiate the waters of friendship, relationships, careers and money.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: Meet Hitch (Will Smith), New York City's greatest matchmaker. Love is his job and he'll get you the girl of your dreams in just three easy dates, guaranteed!

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding (1997)
programme.desc: Two friends (Julia Roberts and Dermot Mulroney) go from an impossible possibility to an unimaginable reality in this romantic comedy.

programme.title: 30 Minutes Or Less
programme.desc: The tale of three slacker friends and the adventures that ensure after one of them inadvertently robs a bank armed only with a large salami.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: Jumping The Broom
programme.desc: A collision of worlds when two African-American families from divergent socioeconomic backgrounds get together one weekend in Martha's Vineyard for a wedding.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A Hawaiian island playboy has to use his imagination to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory. Every night he is erased from her memory so he has to make her fall in love with him all over again the next day...and the next...and the next!

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Two disgraced FBI agents go way undercover in an effort to protect hotel heiresses the Wilton Sisters from a kidnapping plot.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al does his yearly pre-Christmas inspection of the family and can find they've done nothing wrong, which means he has to buy them presents, but he has to take a job as a Department Store Santa to pay for the gifts.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: As the Bundys prepare to attend their cousin Jimmy's wedding, everything begins to go wrong. Al can't find his suit, Peg can't get her make-up right, Kelly and the bridesmaids think they have on the wrong dresses and Bud gets caught with the bride.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.sub-title: It Doesn't Get Any Better Than This
programme.desc: Al takes a fishing trip alone, only to have Peg and Marcy show up and spoil his vacation.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Kelly buys a motorcycle to put some fun back into her life, but disaster strikes when Al decides to take the bike out for a spin.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peggy's unflattering cartoon makes Al a reluctant celebrity.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Bud goes on a dating game for "nerds."

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: While reading a romance novel, Peg fantasizes that she is a lady in distress and Al is the pirate who saves her

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al becomes obsessed with his age after a theater cashier gives him a senior citizen's discount.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Peggy panics over Seven's sneezes, she begins piling up medical bills, forcing Al to take on a second job as a "topless" bartender.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peg tries everything in the book to renew Al's romantic interest in her -- up to and including promises of five-course meals.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Desperate for a date, Bud founds his own community college fraternity in his garage.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: With the elections coming up, Al convinces his family to register and vote for the first time in an effort to stop a proposed tax on beer. When the tax increase passes, Al leads an angry protest to overturn the bill.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Al becomes a local hero when he stands up to a burglar.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Kelly gets an unpleasant surprise when the family takes her to a movie on her birthday.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Peg complains about Al's lovemaking to the girls at the beauty parlor, he becomes the laughingstock of the town.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Peg spends all of Al's early retirement money and forces him to go back to work.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Al's Dodge is stolen, he learns it is only worth $100, and he decides to add a few priceless items to the list of things missing from his trunk.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: When Jimmy, the Bundy's relative, learns that his new bride slept with someone the day of their wedding, his temper explodes and a guilty Bud runs for cover.

programme.title: Married...With Children
programme.desc: Coco, a cosmetic millionairess and former girlfriend of Al's, makes a truly indecent proposal by offering Peggy $500,000 for one night of passion with Al.

programme.sub-title: A Tisket, A Tasket, Can Peggy Make A Basket
programme.desc: Al gets a pair of tickets to a big basketball game.

programme.desc: Bud's latest attempts to impress women fail miserably, causing him such embarrassment that he confines himself to the basement. But when his "cool" alter ego appears, Bud learns the secrets of gaining adoration.

programme.desc: Peg checks Al's horoscope and insists he's due for a stroke of good luck. But when good things actually start happening, Al gets a shrinking feeling that his luck won't last.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Finding Samantha struggling to repair a lamp, Aunt Clara uses her uncertain powers of magic to summon an electrician. Benjamin Franklin, in l8th century clothes, appears. Samantha is upset by Ben's presence and Aunt Clara's wail that she can't remember how to undo the spell. Darrin, astonished by Ben's appearance in his home, can't convince Larry Tate that Ben is not is creation for an advertising campaign for Franklin Elec-tronics. Abner Kravitz refuses to believe Gladys' report that the real Ben Franklin is at the Stephens'. Bowing to Samantha's pleas, Darrin agrees to allow her and Aunt Clara to show Ben how his inventions are being used is the city. The next morning Ben, leaving a note that he has decided to tour the city alone to avoid causing domestic discord, sets out. Darrin, Samantha and Aunt Clara start searching for him. At a firehouse, inspecting an old fire engine, Ben steps on the accelerator. The engine shoots out into the street and slams into a curb. Ben is arrested and taken to court, where the judge, sure it is all a publicity stunt, charges him with grand larceny and sets bail at a thousand dollars. Darrin puts up the bail, knowing he will lose it if Ben doesn't appear for trial is a month. Just then, Aunt Clara remembers the spell and Ben vanishes.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Summing up "My Friend Ben" Samantha tells how Aunt Clara, trying to summon an electrician to fix a lamp, produces Ben Franklin instead.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha tells Aunt Clara she plans to get a bank loan in order to tear down the gazebo and build a rumpus room.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon, the Accident Man, is a stone cold killer, he is the best at what he does. But when a loved one is dragged into the London underworld and murdered by his own crew, Fallon is forced to rip apart the life he knew in order to avenge the one person who actually meant something to him.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Suspect (1987)
programme.desc: This tension-filled courtroom drama opens with the suicide of a Supreme Court justice. Then the young Justice Department employee to whom he had given privileged information is discovered dead. A deaf-mute Vietnam veteran is charged with her murder and Cher, a public defender, is appointed counsel.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in an ancient web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Obsessed
programme.desc: When successful financial advisor Derek Charles (Idris Elba) settles into a new Los Angeles neighborhood with his loving wife Sharon (Beyonce Knowles) and young son Kyle, everything seems perfect. But when a beautiful temp, Lisa (Ali Larter), joins the firm, Derek's life takes a strange turn. After a misunderstood encounter at the company holiday party, Lisa begins to spiral out of control - putting Derek's career in jeopardy and Sharon's marriage and life on the line.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: Miss Bala (2019)
programme.desc: A beauty contest winner is forced to work for a crime boss after she witnesses a murder. Remake of the 2011 film.

programme.title: Ladder 49
programme.desc: Trapped in a fire that looks likely to kill him, a fireman takes the opportunity to look back over his life, career and marriage, while he waits for his company,Ladder 49, to rescue him, if they can.

programme.title: Gloria (1980)
programme.desc: Rowlands garnered an Oscar nomination for her fierce portrayal as an ex-mob mistress who takes care of a young boy after his family is wiped out by the Mafia. Gloria must rely on all her street-savvy to prevent both herself and the boy from being the mobster's next target.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Missionary Man
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rolls into town on a unique motorcycle. All he carries is the bible and a desire for justice. Past vengeance collides as Ryder rights an injustice from his past and liberates the small town from a malicious oppressor.

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: 37 hours after David Kim's (John Cho) 16-year-old daughter goes missing without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter's laptop.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman star in this futuristic sci-fi thriller about a world where genetic engineering is used to perfect the human species.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A teenaged client is severely wounded when he intervenes to help save Nick's life.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: As the prospect of being stalked terrifies Lulu, Nick looks to protect a small boy from an abusive parent.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Lulu's mom turns to Nick when she relocates her business to Pittsburgh and wants her daughter to join her.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: While under pressure to execute a merger for a longtime client, Nick must find a missing girl whose bone marrow can save her ailing brother's life.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Nick encourages a drug-addicted dad to pursue a wrongful death lawsuit in order to give his children and their foster parents some money.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Kinky sexual practices lead Lulu's college roommate and her husband to be suspects in their daughter's murder.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Following his uncle’s mysterious death, Alex Rider begins a quest for answers that leads him into a dark world of secrets and espionage. He comes to realise that his uncle wasn’t the man he thought he was – and that Alex himself is expected to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Still reeling from the revelation that his uncle was a spy for the British Government, Alex is kidnapped and interrogated by an unknown group of paramilitary agents. It will take all his hidden skills to turn the tables on his captors.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex is thrown into the unfamiliar world of the ultra-rich as he struggles to perfect his cover identity, but risks alienating his best friend Tom by keeping the mission a secret.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As his covert investigation of Point Blanc gets underway, Alex discovers that he’s been left vulnerable. The Department seem to be closing in on the double-agent in their ranks – but the killer Yassen gets there first.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Appalled to realise that the students in Point Blanc are being mysteriously changed by Doctor Greif, Alex enlists Kyra and James in a plan to escape. Blunt spearheads an investigation into Parker Roscoe.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Tom lands in the crosshairs of the conspiracy behind Ian Rider’s murder, Alex and Kyra find evidence of Dr. Greif’s secret plan.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex leads a Special Forces squad back inside Point Blanc in a stealth mission to rescue his friends and stop Greif’s plans.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: The Department finally solve the mystery of Ian’s death and realise that an old, lethal enemy has resurfaced – while Alex faces off against his own duplicate in a desperate battle to save the people he loves.

programme.title: Breaking Bad

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Skyler's affair with her boss creates chaos within her fractured marriage, a new batch of meth that puts Jesse back in business inadvertently gets Walt involved, too.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Skyler reconsiders her objections to him living back at home, Walt mulls over an offer to return to the drug trade; Hank's obsession with nailing "Heisenberg" promises trouble for Jesse.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Walt resumes business in Gus's state-of-the art meth lab, the discovery of their old RV forces him and Jesse to act fast to keep from being busted by Hank.

programme.title: Breaking Bad

programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: The Curse of La Llorona
programme.desc: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect arrives in America to rebuild his life. On his own in a strange new country, a wealthy industrialist recognizes his talent -- but power and legacy comes at a heavy cost.

programme.title: Larry Kramer in Love and Anger
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jean Carlomusto examines the life of Larry Kramer, playwright, author and activist for gay rights.

programme.title: Breslin and Hamill: Deadline Artists
programme.desc: The lives and careers of journalists Jimmy Breslin and Pete Hamill.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Judy
programme.desc: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: A grief-stricken widow stops by a remote cabin after getting lost on the back roads of Minnesota in the middle of winter. She soon finds herself in a desperate fight for survival as she encounters a murderous couple holding a young woman hostage.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: Frankenstein 1970
programme.desc: The baron's grandson (Boris Karloff) rents the family castle to a TV crew to fund his atomic revival of the family monster.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights
programme.desc: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

programme.title: All the Beauty and the Bloodshed
programme.desc: From Academy Award winner Laura Poitras comes an epic, emotional and interconnected story about internationally renowned artist and activist Nan Goldin told through her slideshows, intimate interviews, ground-breaking photography, and rare footage of her personal fight to hold the Sackler family accountable for the opioid crisis. The film interweaves Goldin's past and present, the deeply personal and urgently political, from P.A.I.N.'s (Prescription Addiction Intervention Now) actions.

programme.title: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: Filmmaker Andrew Rossi examines the rising phenomenon of fake news and how it impacts the average citizen in the United States.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Animated comedy about Bob Belcher, who runs Bob's Burgers restaurant, and his family. The Belchers head off to a lake for some watersports, but Bob's decision to make a side trip to see his mother's grave first leads to problems as the grave map that Bob is given is impossible to read, the sun is setting fast, and the markers are buried in snow - meanwhile, Linda remains outside the graveyard stricken by a fear of death, and Teddy panics after accidentally eating forbidden meatloaf from the Belchers' fridge while doing some repair work.

programme.title: G'wed

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom following three desperate young men who reside in ancient Rome. Stylax buys Grumio an erotic vase for his birthday featuring a character who bears a striking resemblance to someone nearby, and Marcus - who is under pressure from the girls - suggests that they swap roles for the day. Meanwhile, Stylax hangs out with his cousin Lucretia, someone that he has an unusually close relationship with...

programme.title: Unwind with ITV

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. Ali and Hana have two very talented young children - and a very noisy and crowded house. Their son Mateja is a budding drummer while their daughter Mila enjoys everything from tap dancing to violin - to give everyone in this family their own space, Brian and Sarah turn an old garage into a kids' music and arts hangout.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the exciting and iconic gameshow as yet another of his daring contestants takes on the infamous Banker and, by opening those iconic 22 red boxes in the right order, could be in with the chance of winning a life-changing cash prize. There are no questions here except for one: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Dress To Impress
programme.desc: Three single lads are hoping to win the heart of singer and social media handler Emily - gas pipe fitter Anthony, lifeguard Kai, and bodybuilding banker Sol are competing in a shopping challenge in Manchester and searching for the perfect outfit to win a date. Which of the three guys will Dress to Impress?

programme.title: Billie & Greg: The Family Diaries
programme.desc: Reality series. With school nearly out for summer and Arthur about to start a new school, Billie is left doubting whether she has made a good decision - meanwhile, Margot starts swimming lessons and Greg gets a job, but it seems that he is a bit out of practice. Elsewhere, Billie and Sue find Chatty in a bad way that results in a visit to hospital - when a worrying phone call to Billie follows, it sends their worlds into a spin and drastic measures need to be taken. With Chatty hitting rock bottom, Billie, Greg and Sue rally together to get Chatty booked into rehab - however, all is not as straightforward as they hoped.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When six-month-old baby Alex Raines tragically dies, it seems at first like a case of cot death. However, when the cause of death is later diagnosed as shaken baby syndrome, Ronnie and Matt have a murder investigation on their hands. There are many possible suspects to look at, including the neglectful mother, the absent father, the resentful nanny and her short-tempered boyfriend. When the case reaches court, some new evidence comes to light which casts doubt over the prosecution's case. The very framework of the Raines family is pulled apart and James and Alesha must do some investigating of their own. Pitted against indefatigable barrister Helena Marsden, they must navigate through the family wreckage that Alex's death left behind with little more than a process of elimination to go on. When the truth is uncovered, has this heart-breaking tragedy left more than one victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A police investigation into a child's disappearance leads officers to a body with a note reading 'They Must be Destroyed.' DS Ronnie Brooks is deeply affected because the note is a terrifying echo of an old case in which he was involved. Six years before, unrepentant racist Andrew Dillon was convicted of killing three young boys from ethnic backgrounds. With Dillon still behind bars, it looks as though there may be a copycat killer picking up where he left off. Or is the reality different - and even more frightening? James Steel finds himself under intense scrutiny when it comes to light that he was the one who successfully prosecuted Dillon for the killings - and that his success was mainly due to 'selective prosecution.' Is Steel guilty of perverting the course of justice? Did he tamper with key evidence in order to win a conviction and secure a promotion?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the brutal murder of young physiotherapist Lizzie Faulkner, who was gunned down at a luxury country retreat - in a story of betrayal, guilt and the need for atonement, Vera must move quickly to avoid another tragedy. Meanwhile, Joe finally makes amends with the demons from his own past.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Suzanne Morton is brought into a hospital Accident and Emergency department with flu-like symptoms - and leaves in a body bag. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin treat her case as suspicious as they investigate the department, which has had three similar deaths within six months. The ward was extremely busy the night Suzanne died, which makes their job tougher - can they find the killer before another victim is targeted? When the case comes to court, senior crown prosecutor Jacob Thorne is pulled in opposite directions as the chief suspect claims to have been framed for murder by others in his department. With a conspiracy of silence spreading through the hospital staff, it becomes clear that there is more to the case than meets the eye. In order to find the truth, the team must penetrate the hospital staff's web of professional loyalties.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: This episode, Safe, sees the team investigate the reported kidnapping of a small child. When two-year-old Ryan Stark goes missing from a high street merry-go-round, his distraught mother Kayla reports him kidnapped and a massive police hunt is launched to find the missing toddler. In spite of public appeals and additional manpower, the search seems to throw up more questions than answers. With the investigation seemingly going nowhere, the team have to dig deeper - and they discover that the child had a history with social services before he went missing. Armed with this new information, the team wonder whether Kayla is not being entirely truthful. But with more than one suspect and a complete lack of physical evidence, can they ever get to the bottom of what happened to baby Ryan?

programme.desc: Detective drama series. A wealthy man tells Poirot that he intends to change his will and leave everything to his ward Violet Wilson, but when he is murdered before he can change the document, the old will is stolen from his solicitor's office. The local doctor soon comes under suspicion, but the cool-headed Poirot avoids jumping to conclusions.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The gripping crime drama continues with an episode in which there may be more to a seemingly cut-and-dried case than meets the eye. When call girl Katka Cizek is found dead in a pool of blood in an upmarket apartment, only one of her admirers seems to fit the bill for the culprit. He was with her on the night of her death, he does not have an alibi and he has everything to lose if his secret obsession with her were to be revealed. The evidence against him seems clear, and when the matter comes to trial, crown prosecutor Alesha Phillips is given the reins to lead the cross-examination. But as she looks further into the case, Alesha begins to suspect that someone has reason to frame the accused. As she digs deeper, determined to find the truth, she uncovers a shattering betrayal which proves that there are no winners in this case.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The police are called to investigate a horrifying gun attack which has left a nightclub peppered with bullets and two victims bleeding out on the floor. But the shocks do not end there, as the shooters begin a deadly rampage through the streets of London. With the media swarming over the case and a hostage in danger, Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin find themselves up against the clock as they desperately hunt down the Bonnie-and-Clyde duo responsible for the bloody massacre. When the violent pair are brought to trial, defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone claims that one of the two suspects was more innocent victim than vicious killer. Was the defendant acting out of fear after being beaten and bullied into submission by her partner-in-crime? Aware that there are two sides to every story, the team are under pressure to ensure that someone is held responsible for a murderous spree which has claimed five lives.
